calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-03-2020 Off Calendar

Notice Of Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Dec-10-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Brian J. Evers.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gail Dekreon. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Brenda Crow, CSR #10503. Email: arobles@sftc.org.

Sydney E. Fairbairn, Esq. specially appeared for plaintiff THELIONS.
Johnny Jiang, Head of Operations for plaintiff, was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendant RESULTS.COM USA Inc., a California corporation.
Plaintiff's Complaint for Money/Common Counts was filed on December 18, 2018, and personally served on defendant's authorized Agent of Process on January14, 2019.
Default as to defendant RESULTS.COM USA Inc., a California corporation, was entered on June 11, 2019.
DOE defendants were dismissed on May 24, 2019.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff the Ritz-Carlton Hotel Company, LLC, a Delaware limited liability company, d/b/a THELIONS, and against the defaulted defendant RESULTS.COM USA Inc., a California corporation, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $41,830.50.
Prejudgment Interest - $6,910.38.
Attorney Fees - $1,200.00.
Costs - $540.00.
Total - $50,480.88.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
